title: Support host networking with podma play kube
body:
If the hostNetwork boolean is set in the kubernetes yaml file,
set the networking to host.


Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

NACK, this won't set the infra container network properly. Working on a fix right now.
The work in #5241 will allow this to work
Basically will have to pass `WithPodHostNetwork()` when making the pod
